description_long: This object is a rectangular, black CD player with a sleek, low-profile design typical of home audio equipment. The front face features a central disc tray, flanked by several small buttons and possibly a display screen, all integrated into a glossy black panel. The top and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The rear panel includes various input and output ports, likely for audio connections and power, with some labeling visible. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. Its size and form factor suggest it is designed to sit on a shelf or within an entertainment center in an urban home or public space.
description: A sleek, rectangular black CD player with a central disc tray, control buttons, and rear audio ports. Its minimalist design features a glossy front and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the disc tray, control buttons, and possible display screen.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a featureless, smooth black panel.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible audio ports, power input, and labeling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also smooth and featureless.
